'''gajaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:taalim|taalim]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:taalim|taalim]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gajaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjæjæth|gæjæjæth]] || [[word:gæjæjæj|gæjæjæj]] || [[word:gæjæjæsh|gæjæjæsh]] || [[word:gæjæjæ|gæjæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajajajath|gajajajath]] || [[word:gajajajaj|gajajajaj]] || [[word:gajajajash|gajajajash]] || [[word:gajajaja|gajajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajajath|gajajath]] || [[word:gajajaj|gajajaj]] || [[word:gajajash|gajajash]] || [[word:gajaja|gajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajafjath|gajafjath]] || [[word:gajafjaj|gajafjaj]] || [[word:gajafjash|gajafjash]] || [[word:gajafjaf|gajafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajajatha|gajajatha]] || [[word:gajajaja|gajajaja]] || [[word:gajajasha|gajajasha]] || [[word:gajajaka|gajajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajajath|gajajath]] || [[word:gajajaj|gajajaj]] || [[word:gajajash|gajajash]] || [[word:gajaja|gajaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajajathal|gajajathal]] || [[word:gajajajal|gajajajal]] || [[word:gajajashal|gajajashal]] || [[word:gajajakal|gajajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajajathatha|gajajathatha]] || [[word:gajajajaja|gajajajaja]] || [[word:gajajashasha|gajajashasha]] || [[word:gajajaka|gajajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajajathan|gajajathan]] || [[word:gajajajan|gajajajan]] || [[word:gajajashan|gajajashan]] || [[word:gajajakan|gajajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajajathaoro|gajajathaoro]] || [[word:gajajajaoro|gajajajaoro]] || [[word:gajajashaoro|gajajashaoro]] || [[word:gajajakaoro|gajajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
